title: OXKOX Pack of 2 Dog Bowl - Stainless Steel Dishwasher Safe - Bowl for Cats, Dogs, Pups, and Kittens - Ideal for Wet and Dry DOG Food and Water Bowl (Small)
features: 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 Made of top-notch quality stainless steel, this dog bowl is one of the best dog bowls . Not only stainless steel makes the puppy bowls rust-resistant, but also, every dog bowl is free from BPA and other toxic materials. Lastly, these food-safe material dog bowls are odourless, a good replacement for plastic.

𝐀𝐧𝐭𝐢-𝐬𝐥𝐢𝐩 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: Sometimes, slipping or skidding of food bowls irritates the pets so much. Hence, the non-skid base of the dog bowls large makes sure that the food does not spill out in any situation. Make your dog eat comfortably with these dogs feeder bowls.

𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲-𝐭𝐨-𝐜𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧: The large dog bowls are always easy to clean as you can wash them with hands using mild detergent, and the food will remain hygienic. Secondly, if you find it challenging, then you can use a dishwasher to keep the eating bowls clean.

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞: Not only this slow feeder bowl is for dogs, but also it can be used to feed a puppy, cat, or some other pet. You can put water in one bowl and food in the other, but you do not have to do this always. The dog food bowl can be used for putting wet food, dry kibble, water, or any other food.

𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞: Either you are looking for food bowls for small dogs, or large dogs, the size of these feeders for dogs is ideal. We have sizes from Small Dog Bowls (17.5 cm) to Extra Large Dog Bowls (28 cm). You may select Accordingly.
